#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)

MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name')
DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')
COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0')
PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1)
DURATION_MS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0')

CYAN='\033[36m'; GREEN='\033[32m'; YELLOW='\033[33m'; RED='\033[31m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# Pick bar color based on context usage
if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"
elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"
else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi

FILLED=$((PCT / 10)); EMPTY=$((10 - FILLED))
BAR=$(printf "%${FILLED}s" | tr ' ' '◆')$(printf "%${EMPTY}s" | tr ' ' '.')

MINS=$((DURATION_MS / 60000)); SECS=$(((DURATION_MS % 60000) / 1000))

BRANCH=""
git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && BRANCH=" | ${GREEN}◆${RESET} $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"

printf "${CYAN}[$MODEL]${RESET} ${DIR##*/}$BRANCH\n"
COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$COST")
printf "${BAR_COLOR}${BAR}${RESET} ${PCT}%% | ${YELLOW}${COST_FMT}${RESET} | ▶ ${MINS}m ${SECS}s\n"

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)

MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name')
DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')
COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0')
PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1)
DURATION_MS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0')
CTX_SIZE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0')
TOT_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0')
TOT_OUT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0')
CUR_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty')
CACHE_READ=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0')
CACHE_WRITE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0')

CYAN='\033[36m'; GREEN='\033[32m'; YELLOW='\033[33m'; RED='\033[31m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# Pick bar color based on context usage
if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"
elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"
else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi

# 20-segment bar for finer granularity
BAR_WIDTH=20
FILLED=$(( PCT * BAR_WIDTH / 100 ))
EMPTY=$(( BAR_WIDTH - FILLED ))
BAR=$(printf "%${FILLED}s" | tr ' ' '▪')$(printf "%${EMPTY}s" | tr ' ' '·')

MINS=$((DURATION_MS / 60000)); SECS=$(((DURATION_MS % 60000) / 1000))

BRANCH=""
git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && BRANCH=" | ${GREEN}◆${RESET} $(git -C "$DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"

# Format large numbers with k suffix
fmt_k() {
  local n=$1
  if [ "$n" -ge 1000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    printf "%dk" $(( n / 1000 ))
  else
    printf "%d" "$n"
  fi
}

CTX_SIZE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CTX_SIZE")
TOT_IN_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_IN")
TOT_OUT_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_OUT")

# Token detail line: only show cache info if there was a last call
TOKEN_DETAIL="${DIM}in:${RESET}${TOT_IN_FMT} ${DIM}out:${RESET}${TOT_OUT_FMT}"
if [ -n "$CUR_IN" ]; then
  CACHE_READ_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_READ")
  CACHE_WRITE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_WRITE")
  TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}cache:${RESET}${CACHE_READ_FMT}r/${CACHE_WRITE_FMT}w"
fi
TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}/ ctx:${RESET}${CTX_SIZE_FMT}"

printf "${CYAN}[$MODEL]${RESET} ${DIR##*/}$BRANCH\n"
COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$COST")
printf "${BAR_COLOR}${BAR}${RESET} ${PCT}%% | ${YELLOW}${COST_FMT}${RESET} | ▶ ${MINS}m ${SECS}s\n"
printf "${TOKEN_DETAIL}\n"

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)

MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name')
DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')
COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0')
PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1)
DURATION_MS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0')
CTX_SIZE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0')
TOT_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0')
TOT_OUT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0')
CUR_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty')
CACHE_READ=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0')
CACHE_WRITE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0')

CYAN='\033[36m'; GREEN='\033[32m'; YELLOW='\033[33m'; RED='\033[31m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# Pick bar color based on context usage
if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"
elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"
else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi

# 20-segment bar for finer granularity
BAR_WIDTH=20
FILLED=$(( PCT * BAR_WIDTH / 100 ))
EMPTY=$(( BAR_WIDTH - FILLED ))
BAR=$(printf "%${FILLED}s" | tr ' ' '▪')$(printf "%${EMPTY}s" | tr ' ' '·')

MINS=$((DURATION_MS / 60000)); SECS=$(((DURATION_MS % 60000) / 1000))

BRANCH=""
git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && BRANCH=" | ${GREEN}◆${RESET} $(git -C "$DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"

# Format large numbers with k suffix
fmt_k() {
  local n=$1
  if [ "$n" -ge 1000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    printf "%dk" $(( n / 1000 ))
  else
    printf "%d" "$n"
  fi
}

CTX_SIZE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CTX_SIZE")
TOT_IN_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_IN")
TOT_OUT_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_OUT")

# Token detail line: only show cache info if there was a last call
TOKEN_DETAIL="${DIM}in:${RESET}${TOT_IN_FMT} ${DIM}out:${RESET}${TOT_OUT_FMT}"
if [ -n "$CUR_IN" ]; then
  CACHE_READ_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_READ")
  CACHE_WRITE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_WRITE")
  TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}cache:${RESET}${CACHE_READ_FMT}r/${CACHE_WRITE_FMT}w"
fi
TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}/ ctx:${RESET}${CTX_SIZE_FMT}"

printf "${CYAN}[$MODEL]${RESET} ${DIR##*/}$BRANCH\n"
COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$COST")
printf "${BAR_COLOR}${BAR}${RESET} ${PCT}%% | ${YELLOW}${COST_FMT}${RESET} | ▶ ${MINS}m ${SECS}s\n"
printf "${TOKEN_DETAIL}\n"

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)

MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name')
DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')
COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0')
WEEK_COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.week_cost_usd // 0')
PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1)
DURATION_MS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0')
CTX_SIZE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0')
TOT_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0')
TOT_OUT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0')
CUR_IN=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty')
CACHE_READ=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0')
CACHE_WRITE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0')

CYAN='\033[36m'; GREEN='\033[32m'; YELLOW='\033[33m'; RED='\033[31m'; DIM='\033[2m'; RESET='\033[0m'

# Pick bar color based on context usage
if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"
elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"
else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi

# 20-segment bar for context window
BAR_WIDTH=20
FILLED=$(( PCT * BAR_WIDTH / 100 ))
EMPTY=$(( BAR_WIDTH - FILLED ))
BAR=$(printf "%${FILLED}s" | tr ' ' '▪')$(printf "%${EMPTY}s" | tr ' ' '·')

MINS=$((DURATION_MS / 60000)); SECS=$(((DURATION_MS % 60000) / 1000))

BRANCH=""
git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && BRANCH=" | ${GREEN}◆${RESET} $(git -C "$DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"

# Format large numbers with k suffix
fmt_k() {
  local n=$1
  if [ "$n" -ge 1000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    printf "%dk" $(( n / 1000 ))
  else
    printf "%d" "$n"
  fi
}

# Build a cost bar: make_cost_bar <cost_float> <limit_float> <bar_width>
# Outputs:  <colored_bar> <pct>
make_cost_bar() {
  local cost=$1 limit=$2 width=$3
  # Convert float to integer cents to avoid requiring bc
  local cost_cents limit_cents
  cost_cents=$(echo "$cost" | awk '{printf "%d", $1 * 100}')
  limit_cents=$(echo "$limit" | awk '{printf "%d", $1 * 100}')
  local pct=0
  if [ "$limit_cents" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    pct=$(( cost_cents * 100 / limit_cents ))
    [ "$pct" -gt 100 ] && pct=100
  fi
  local filled=$(( pct * width / 100 ))
  local empty=$(( width - filled ))
  local color
  if [ "$pct" -ge 90 ]; then color="$RED"
  elif [ "$pct" -ge 70 ]; then color="$YELLOW"
  else color="$GREEN"; fi
  local bar
  bar=$(printf "%${filled}s" | tr ' ' '▪')$(printf "%${empty}s" | tr ' ' '·')
  printf "%b%s%b %d%%" "$color" "$bar" "$RESET" "$pct"
}

# Cost bar limits (USD)
SESSION_LIMIT=5
WEEK_LIMIT=50

COST_BAR=$(make_cost_bar "$COST" "$SESSION_LIMIT" 15)
WEEK_BAR=$(make_cost_bar "$WEEK_COST" "$WEEK_LIMIT" 15)

CTX_SIZE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CTX_SIZE")
TOT_IN_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_IN")
TOT_OUT_FMT=$(fmt_k "$TOT_OUT")

# Token detail line: only show cache info if there was a last call
TOKEN_DETAIL="${DIM}in:${RESET}${TOT_IN_FMT} ${DIM}out:${RESET}${TOT_OUT_FMT}"
if [ -n "$CUR_IN" ]; then
  CACHE_READ_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_READ")
  CACHE_WRITE_FMT=$(fmt_k "$CACHE_WRITE")
  TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}cache:${RESET}${CACHE_READ_FMT}r/${CACHE_WRITE_FMT}w"
fi
TOKEN_DETAIL="${TOKEN_DETAIL} ${DIM}/ ctx:${RESET}${CTX_SIZE_FMT}"

SESSION_COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$COST")
WEEK_COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$WEEK_COST")

printf "${CYAN}[$MODEL]${RESET} ${DIR##*/}$BRANCH\n"
printf "${BAR_COLOR}${BAR}${RESET} ${PCT}%% | ▶ ${MINS}m ${SECS}s\n"
printf "${DIM}session:${RESET} %s ${YELLOW}%s${RESET} ${DIM}/ week:${RESET} %s ${YELLOW}%s${RESET}\n" \
  "$COST_BAR" "$SESSION_COST_FMT" "$WEEK_BAR" "$WEEK_COST_FMT"
printf "${TOKEN_DETAIL}\n"
